nasb.text: All of them are stubbornly rebellious, Going about as a talebearer. They are bronze and iron; They, all of them, are corrupt.

esv.text: They are all stubbornly rebellious, going about with slanders; they are bronze and iron; all of them act corruptly.

cnv.text: 他們都是十分悖逆的人， 到處搬弄是非。 他們是銅是鐵， 他們都是敗壞的。

ccb.text: 他们顽固不化， 如铜如铁， 四处毁谤， 极其败坏。
